title: Mildly Garlicky Argentinian Chicken Stew
description: A flavorful and healthy Argentinian chicken stew with a mild garlicky taste, perfect for a weeknight dinner. It features cultured creme fraiche and leaf wrap steam for added flavor and nutrition.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a kazan cauldron over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the chicken broth, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Wrap the bay leaves around the handle of the kazan cauldron to create a leaf wrap steam effect.
Stir in the cultured creme fraiche and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
